content.situation: 顾客走进花店，店员热情打招呼，顾客想表达自己正在寻找一份礼物
content.speakerText: Hi there! How can I help you today?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！今天需要帮您什么忙吗？
content.responseTemplate: Hi! I'm looking for ___ for a special occasion.
content.hint: 表达寻找某物用于特殊场合，常用 'something nice' 或 'a gift' 这类模糊但礼貌的表达
content.knowledgePoint: 表达购物目的的礼貌句型

content.situation: 店员介绍新品，顾客想表达对颜色和氛围的偏好，以便获得推荐
content.speakerText: We've got fresh blooms in today—perfect for gifts!
content.speakerTextCn: 今天刚到新鲜花束，特别适合送礼！
content.responseTemplate: That sounds great! I'd like ___ and uplifting.
content.hint: 描述对花束氛围的偏好时，常用 'bright', 'cheerful', 'uplifting' 等形容词
content.knowledgePoint: 表达审美偏好与情感需求的形容词搭配

content.situation: 顾客进店后不想立即购买，但希望礼貌地回应店员的问候
content.speakerText: Welcome! Is there anything I can help you find today?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎光临！今天有什么我可以帮您找的吗？
content.responseTemplate: Thanks for asking—I'm just ___ for now.
content.hint: 表达'随便看看'时，'just browsing' 是最自然、最常用的礼貌回应
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌拒绝立即购买的常用表达
